ItemTiers.Name: Tier 1
ItemTiers.Description: Basic gear used by newly awakened adventurers. Simple materials and low stat profiles. Fully craftable.

ItemTiers.Name: Tier 2
ItemTiers.Description: Standard adventuring equipment. Offers solid base stats and introductory horizontal diversity. Fully craftable.

ItemTiers.Name: Tier 3
ItemTiers.Description: High-quality gear representing the peak of standard mortal craftsmanship. Provides powerful attributes and elemental modifiers. Fully craftable.

ItemTiers.Name: Tier 4
ItemTiers.Description: Rare items recovered from high-tier monsters, world events, and dangerous areas. Uncraftable. Features powerful active/passive affixes.

ItemTiers.Name: Tier 5
ItemTiers.Description: Near-legendary artifact equipment of extreme scarcity and prestige. Uncraftable. Found only through supreme challenges, world bosses, and deep endgame encounters.
